address: Klong Hae, Hat Yai District, Songkhla
best_time_to_visit: Late afternoon on a Saturday for the liveliest atmosphere and golden-hour photos

description.en:
## Southern Thailand's Only Floating Market

Khlong Hae Floating Market is the only authentic floating market in Southern Thailand, making it a unique cultural experience you will not find elsewhere south of Bangkok. Located along a peaceful canal in the Khlong Hae community about 6 kilometres northwest of Hat Yai city centre, the market comes alive every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday afternoon.

## What to Expect

Vendors paddle traditional wooden boats along the canal, selling freshly prepared Southern Thai dishes served in eco-friendly coconut-shell bowls. Popular items include khao yam (Southern rice salad), roti with curry, grilled seafood skewers, and sweet treats like khanom krok. Prices are very affordable, with most dishes costing between 30 and 80 THB.

Beyond the food boats, the canal banks are lined with additional stalls offering handicrafts, local snacks, and souvenirs. A small stage near the entrance hosts traditional cultural performances, including Manora dance shows and live Southern Thai music on weekend evenings.

## Boat Rides

For 20 THB per person you can take a short boat ride along the canal, passing by the floating vendors and lush tropical vegetation. It is a relaxing way to see the market from the water and makes for excellent photos.

## Getting There

The market is about a 15-minute drive from central Hat Yai. Songthaew (shared pickup trucks) run from the city centre, or you can grab a tuk-tuk for around 100–150 THB. Parking is available on-site for 30 THB.
description.nl: Avond drijvende markt met lokaal eten boottochten en culturele optredens

tips: Go on Friday for the same experience with smaller crowds than Saturday or Sunday
Bring cash in small denominations — most vendors do not accept cards or QR payments
Wear comfortable shoes as paths along the canal can be muddy after rain

metaTitle.en: Hat Yai Floating Market (Khlong Hae) — Free Entry, Open Fri-Sun
metaTitle.nl: Hat Yai Drijvende Markt (Khlong Hae) — Gratis Entree, Open Vrij-Zon

metaDescription.en: Visit Southern Thailand's only floating market. Khlong Hae Hat Yai: free entry, eco-friendly food in coconut shells, boat rides & cultural shows. Open Fri-Sun 13:00-21:00. Photos, tips & directions.
metaDescription.nl: Bezoek de enige drijvende markt in Zuid-Thailand. Khlong Hae Hat Yai: gratis entree, eten in kokosnootschalen, boottochten & shows. Open vrij-zon 13:00-21:00. Foto's, tips & routebeschrijving.
